response.justification: Bogdan brings valuable geospatial domain expertise through GISCollective and Green Map work, plus proven C++ systems programming experience from National Instruments and personal projects. However, his C++ work is over a decade old and his recent career (2018-present) has shifted significantly toward TypeScript/Node.js product development rather than systems-level infrastructure. Most critically, there is no demonstrated experience building or operating routing engines, navigation systems, or mapping data pipelines—core responsibilities of this role. The geospatial foundation makes this interview-worthy, but the gap between his past systems experience and current routing domain expertise creates meaningful uncertainty.
strengths: Deep geospatial domain knowledge from founding GISCollective and developing web GIS applications for Green Map, directly applicable to routing tile processing
C++ systems programming background from National Instruments, Altom Consulting, and personal projects including low-level audio and embedded work
Demonstrated ability to learn new technical domains and expand expertise across full stacks throughout multi-decade career
concerns: C++ experience is 11+ years old (last role 2014-2015); primary recent work (2018-present) is TypeScript/Node.js in product/pricing domains, not systems programming
No demonstrated experience building routing engines, navigation guidance systems, or routing data pipelines—core competency for this role
Recent career trajectory emphasizes product feature development and full-stack work rather than infrastructure, operations, or systems-level reliability challenges
